calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Providing The Original Signed Trust And Power Of Attorney, And Filing Of Petition For Approval Of Account
Off Calendar Jun-15-2011 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Providing The Original Signed Trust And Power Of Attorney, And Filing Of Petition For Approval Of Account
Off Calendar Apr-27-2011 Continued To Jun-15-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Bridgman for Patricia Amorello and Jacqueline Craig. Jero Thomas in Propria Persona. Maurice Thomas in Propria Persona. Ken Thomas also present.

Maurice Thomas provided Mr. Bridgman with a summary of accounts. Mr. Thomas also stated that he had the Power of Attorney for the Internal Revenue Service and the Durable Power of Attorney with him. The matter was continued to June 15, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Bridgman and Mr. Thomas agreed to remain in the courtroom and review/go over all of the documents Mr. Thomas had in his possession.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Providing The Original Signed Trust And Power Of Attorney, And Filing Of Petition For Approval Of Account
Off Calendar Apr-13-2011 Continued To Apr-27-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Bridgman for Patricia Amorello.

Mr. Bridgman requested a two week continuance stating that he heard from other Parties but that he had trouble contacting the Attorney. The matter was continued to April 27, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Providing The Original Signed Trust And Power Of Attorney, And Filing Of Petition For Approval Of Account
Off Calendar Feb-09-2011 Continued To Apr-13-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Bridgman for Patricia Amorello.

Mr. Bridgman stated that Attorney Douglas Barnes is coming in to represent Jerolee Thomas and that Mr. Barnes requested a continuance. The matter was continued to April 13, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Providing The Original Signed Trust And Power Of Attorney, And Filing Of Petition For Approval Of Account
Off Calendar Jan-26-2011 Continued To Feb-09-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Dec-21-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Bridgman for Patricia Amorello and Jacqueline Craig.

Mr. Bridgman stated that Jerolee sent him a packet that she called a Trust binder in November, that it contained various copies/drafts of the trust and that she also provided a computer print out what the Estate assets are supposed to be. In addition, Mr. Bridgman stated that Jerolee had not responded to his request to look at the original Trust and signature, that he had not seen the Power of Attorney she was operating under, that he was requesting receipts and supporting documents for the print out, and that she file a proper accounting from that the date she exercised the Power of Attorney (January 1, 2007) to present. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
